title: The House on the Wrong Side of the Tracks
original_title: The House on the Wrong Side of the Tracks
overview: The House on the Wrong Side of the Tracks is a Found Footage Film. Three low life punks commit a home invasion with plans to capture all the action on camera, but when the couples son comes home they soon discover they entered the wrong house.
